python.details: Live package payload or metadata endpoint was reachable.
python.notes: Automated PyPI/TestPyPI publish exists on tags; external conda-forge feedstock merge is manual.

r.details: Manual check did not produce a confirmed publication state.
r.notes: GitHub Release source archives are produced from r-v* tags; CRAN and r-universe are external.

julia.details: General registry contents lookup returned no active package entry.
julia.notes: TagBot sync and GitHub release artifacts are in-repo. Registry approval still depends on the external Julia ecosystem.

rust.notes: Rust is an internal publish=false workspace released through GitHub Releases; no crates.io package is claimed.

conda_forge.notes: The in-repo workflow can create a feedstock update PR; feedstock merge and channel indexing remain external conda-forge gates.

r_universe.notes: r-universe indexing is external to this repository and must be verified independently from GitHub Release source archives.

spack.notes: Spack publication requires an upstream package PR, maintainer review, merge, and package visibility.

easybuild.notes: EasyBuild publication requires an upstream easyconfig PR, maintainer review, merge, and easyconfig visibility.

hpsf.details: Manual check did not produce a confirmed publication state.
hpsf.notes: HPSF curation has no repo-owned package API check here; portal or curation review evidence must be attached by the follow-through track.

e4s.details: Manual check did not produce a confirmed publication state.
e4s.notes: E4S inclusion depends on external curation and usually on upstream HPC packaging evidence such as Spack or EasyBuild.
